AgentAdminConnector - Class in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.client
Implementation of the object that is used for establishing connections with the administration server
AgentAdminConnector(long) - Constructor for class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.client.AgentAdminConnector
Constructor of the object that is used for establishing connections with the administration server, allows specifying connection timeout
AgentAdminConnector(Timer, Executor, long) - Constructor for class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.client.AgentAdminConnector
Constructor of the object that is used for establishing connections with the administration server, with the option to redefine the timer and the executor
AgentAdminConnectorFactory - Class in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.client
Factory for creating objects that are used for establishing connections with the 1C:Enterprise administration server
